name: @missionsquad/mcp-dropbox
description: MissionSquad-compatible Dropbox MCP server with hidden secret injection support.

secretFields.name: accessToken
secretFields.label: Dropbox access token
secretFields.description: Dropbox access token for the current user.

secretFields.name: email
secretFields.label: Dropbox account email
secretFields.description: Dropbox account email. For Dropbox Business team tokens, this lets the server resolve the correct team member automatically.
